chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-825 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A. No.2551/2026. 2. For orders on contempt reference / application. 15.04.2026 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdullah K. Laghari, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Administrator MUECHS (Karar Hussain Memon) present in person. Faheemullah Akhund Branch Manager Kotri. == The Administrator of the MUECHS appointed by this Court vide order dated 12.12.2025 has made a reference to the Court for further orders. After going through the reference and hearing the Administrator, learned counsel for petitioners, learned AAG Sindh, counsel for respondent No.4 and Branch Manager Kotri, we decide the reference as follows: 1. The manner for preparing the voter list for the election to the Society has already been set out in para-8 of order dated 12.12.2025 which reads hereunder: “Any person who owns a plot and is duly registered as a member of the society shall be entitled to contest the election and cast his/her vote. Any person who has lawfully purchased a plot but whose name has not yet been entered in the membership register shall also be provisionally allowed to contest the election and cast his/her vote, subject to verification of ownership documents.” It is clarified that while compiling the voter list as aforesaid, the Administrator shall make separate columns for registered members and provisional members. 2. It is submitted by the Administrator that books of account of the Society are not readily available.

Any person who has lawfully purchased a plot but whose name has not yet been entered in the membership register shall also be provisionally allowed to contest the election and cast his/her vote, subject to verification of ownership documents.” It is clarified that while compiling the voter list as aforesaid, the Administrator shall make separate columns for registered members and provisional members. 2. It is submitted by the Administrator that books of account of the Society are not readily available. It is therefore ordered that the Administrator may hold the election without audit of the books of Society. The audit is left to the Managing Committee that is eventually elected. To that extent, the order dated 12.12.2025 is modified. 3. The Administrator is authorized to draw an amount of Rs.200,000/- (Two Hundred Thousand Rupees) from the Bank Account of the Society towards election expense. Such amount is in addition to the fee of the Administrator. 4. The Administrator is further allowed to pay three months’ past salary due to two staff of the Society namely M/s. Ghulam Mujtaba Jhatial and Ghulam Hussain Sanjrani who are required to assist the Administrator in his assignment. As per the record, the salary of Ghulam Mujtaba Jhatial is Rupees 22,500/- per month whereas the salary of Ghulam Hussain Sanjrani is Rupees 29,500/- per month. Payment shall be made by cheques. Any further salary payable to said staff is left to the upcoming Managing Committee. 5. The Administrator shall concentrate all his efforts to holding the election at the earliest, for which purpose his term as Administrator is extended by 30 (thirty) days. Reference disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
